task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Lead Router** (Level 7)

Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  s
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
owner is 'admin@leadrouter.com'

database is local memory

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'

allow signup and login

define function assign_lead(size):
  if size is 'Enterprise':
    send back 'charlie'
  else if size is 'Mid-market':
    send back 'bob'
  else:
    send back 'alice'

when user sends lead to /api/leads:
  validate lead:
    name must not be empty
    email must not be empty
  assigned = assign_lead(lead's size)
  set lead's assigned_to to assigned
  saved = save lead to Leads
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/leads:
  leads = get all Leads
  send back leads

when user calls GET /api/leads/new:
  new_leads = get all Leads where status is 'new'
  send back new_leads

page 'App' at '/':
  heading 'Lead Router'
  section 'Submit Lead':
    name_input = ''
    email_input = ''
    size_input = 'SMB'
    'Name' is a text input saved as name_input
    'Email' is a text input saved as email_input
    'Company Size' is a dropdown with ['SMB', 'Mid-market', 'Enterprise'] saved as size_input
    button 'Submit Lead':
      send {name: name_input, email: email_input, size: size_input} to '/api/leads'
  section 'All Leads':
    on page load get leads from '/api/leads'
    display leads as table
